title: NoC static knowledge graph for the top 10 notarial case types
purpose: Track open information, documents, decisions, review gates and evidence for frequent German notarial workflows without storing real mandate data in Git.
privacy_rule: All value fields are intentionally empty. Real personal, property, health, estate, family or company data belongs in approved local evidence stores, not in this repository.

source_refs.label: Beurkundungsgesetz, especially general notarial duties and evidence of identity, capacity, representation, reading and electronic certificates
BGB Section 311b for contracts concerning real estate, assets and estates
Grundbuchordnung for land register applications, authorization evidence and inheritance evidence
GmbHG for GmbH formation, registration and managing director details
HGB Section 12 for electronic commercial register applications in publicly certified form
BGB Section 518 for form of gift promise
BGB Section 2353 for certificate of inheritance application
BGB Section 1410 for form of marriage contracts

common_gates.label: No real mandate data committed to Git
Evidence metadata linked to approved storage

cases.title: Immobilienkaufvertrag
cases.summary: Purchase or sale of land, apartment ownership, house or partial ownership with land register, payment maturity, financing and post-signing execution gates.

required_information.label: Property identity
required_information.question: Which land register district, sheet, parcel, unit and current designation identify the object?

required_information.label: Seller identity and capacity
required_information.question: Who sells, how is identity and capacity verified, and is representation involved?

required_information.label: Buyer identity and acquisition structure
required_information.question: Who buys, in which shares, with which address and with which representation?

required_information.label: Purchase price and maturity model
required_information.question: What is the purchase price, payment route, maturity prerequisites and due date mechanism?

required_information.label: Current encumbrances and deletion plan
required_information.question: Which rights, liens, easements or restrictions remain, are deleted or are assumed?

required_information.label: Buyer financing and new land charge need
required_information.question: Is financing required and must a new land charge appointment be coordinated?

required_information.label: Possession, benefits, burdens and risk transfer
required_information.question: When do possession, utilities, insurance risk, public charges and economic burdens transfer?

required_information.label: Pre-emption, tax and approval requirements
required_information.question: Which municipal, tax, family, court, administrator or public approvals are required?

decisions.label: Separate or combined appointment with financing land charge
Delete, assume or preserve registered encumbrances

gates.label: Consumer draft review period checked where applicable
Payment maturity and filing package ready

evidence.label: Intake review and draft release evidence
Land register filing and execution trace

cases.title: Grundschuld / Hypothekenbestellung
cases.summary: Creation, amendment or refinancing of a land charge or mortgage for bank financing, including owner, debtor, lender, rank and enforceability details.

required_information.label: Charged property identity
required_information.question: Which property or unit is to be charged and which land register excerpt is current?

required_information.label: Owner and representation
required_information.question: Who grants the charge and does the signer have authority?

required_information.label: Personal debtor and borrower relation
required_information.question: Who is the borrower or personal debtor and is this identical with the owner?

required_information.label: Creditor bank and contact route
required_information.question: Which bank is creditor and which reviewed instruction channel applies?

required_information.label: Amount, currency, interest and ancillary charges
required_information.question: What amount, currency, annual interest and ancillary performance are requested?

required_information.label: Security purpose and underlying transaction
required_information.question: Which financing or refinancing context explains the security purpose?

required_information.label: Rank, prior rights and deletion consents
required_information.question: Which rank is required and do prior rights or deletion consents affect the application?

required_information.label: Submission to immediate enforcement
required_information.question: Is submission to immediate enforcement requested against property, personal assets, or both?

decisions.label: Land charge, mortgage or amendment
Scope of enforcement clause

cases.title: GmbH-Gruendung / UG-Gruendung
cases.summary: Formation of a GmbH or UG with articles, founders, share capital, managing directors, register application and notary-side identity/signature readiness.

required_information.label: Company name and legal form
required_information.question: Which company name and legal form are intended and are name risks known?

required_information.label: Registered seat and domestic business address
required_information.question: Where are seat and business address located?

required_information.label: Business object
required_information.question: What business object should be registered and are permits relevant?

required_information.label: Founder identities and share allocation
required_information.question: Who are the founders and which nominal shares do they take?

required_information.label: Share capital, nominal shares and contribution type
required_information.question: What capital is subscribed and are cash or in-kind contributions planned?

required_information.label: Managing directors and representation
required_information.question: Who is appointed managing director and what representation rule applies?

required_information.label: Online or in-office register filing route
required_information.question: Which XNP, card, signature and Handelsregister route is used?

required_information.label: Beneficial-owner and AML flags
required_information.question: Which beneficial-owner, sanctions, PEP or AML clarification flags must be reviewed?

decisions.label: Model protocol or individual articles
Online notarization route readiness

gates.label: Card, XNP and signature route checked

evidence.label: XNP, card and signature readiness evidence

cases.title: Handelsregisteranmeldung
cases.summary: Register application for changes such as managing director changes, seat relocation, capital measures, company name changes or procuration.

required_information.label: Entity, register court and register number
required_information.question: Which entity and register sheet are affected?

required_information.label: Register event type
required_information.question: Which event is being registered: management, seat, capital, company name, object, prokura or other?

required_information.label: Signing persons and signing authority
required_information.question: Who must sign and how is authority proven?

required_information.label: Corporate resolution or legal basis
required_information.question: Which resolution, articles clause or external fact authorizes the application?

required_information.label: Required attachments
required_information.question: Which documents must be filed in machine-readable electronic form?

required_information.label: Effective date and wording
required_information.question: Is the change already effective, conditional, future-dated or register-effective only?

required_information.label: XNP and signature route
required_information.question: Which notary card, XNP workspace and EGVP/beN route will be used?

required_information.label: Cost and invoice metadata
required_information.question: Which value or cost metadata is required for GNotKG and office billing?

documents.label: Resolution, appointment, articles or related evidence
documents.source: manual reviewed upload or generated draft

decisions.label: Standard or special register route
Signature and certification method

evidence.label: Register portal submission and response trace

cases.title: Beglaubigung von Unterschriften
cases.summary: Public certification of signatures or hand signs for register filings, powers of attorney, approvals, deletion consents or authority declarations.

required_information.label: Signer identity
required_information.question: Who signs and how is identity established?

required_information.label: Document purpose and recipient
required_information.question: What is the document used for and who receives it?

required_information.label: Signature already made or made before notary
required_information.question: Is the signature acknowledged or executed in front of the notary?

required_information.label: Language and understanding flags
required_information.question: Can the signer understand the relevant language or is translation/support needed?

required_information.label: Representation or company role
required_information.question: Does the signer act personally, as representative, organ, guardian or agent?

required_information.label: Copies, electronic certificate and routing
required_information.question: Which copies, electronic witnesses or delivery routes are required?

required_information.label: Special form or legalization need
required_information.question: Is apostille, legalization, register-specific form or foreign use involved?

required_information.label: Fee value and billing metadata
required_information.question: Which value or fee metadata is needed for billing?

documents.label: Document with signature to certify
documents.source: manual reviewed upload or paper original

decisions.label: Certify identity/signature only or include authority evidence
Paper, electronic or register filing route

cases.title: Testament / Erbvertrag
cases.summary: Preparation and notarization of testamentary dispositions or inheritance contracts with capacity, family situation, assets, prior dispositions and custody gates.

required_information.label: Testator identities
required_information.question: Who makes the disposition and how are identity and capacity reviewed?

required_information.label: Capacity and communication flags
required_information.question: Are there capacity, language, hearing, sight, illness or support flags?

required_information.label: Family and heirship situation
required_information.question: Which spouse, children, relatives, prior marriages or relevant dependents exist?

required_information.label: Estate asset categories
required_information.question: Which relevant asset categories exist without storing detailed values in Git?

required_information.label: Desired dispositions
required_information.question: Who should inherit, receive legacies, be executor or be subject to conditions?

required_information.label: Prior wills, inheritance contracts and revocation needs
required_information.question: Do earlier dispositions exist and are they revocable or binding?

required_information.label: Executor and substitute arrangements
required_information.question: Should an executor, substitute heirs, guardianship wishes or administration rules be included?

required_information.label: Custody and central register route
required_information.question: Which custody and registration steps are required after execution?

documents.label: Draft testament or inheritance contract
documents.source: workflow generated draft after notarial review

documents.label: Prior dispositions evidence reference
documents.source: manual reviewed upload or client-provided original

decisions.label: Testament, joint will or inheritance contract
Include executor provisions

gates.label: Capacity and free will reviewed by notary

cases.title: Erbscheinsantrag / Nachlassangelegenheiten
cases.summary: Application and declarations for certificate of inheritance, estate court proceedings, renunciation, oath and inheritance evidence workflows.

required_information.label: Decedent identity and death metadata
required_information.question: Who died, when and where, and which evidence confirms this?

required_information.label: Last habitual residence and jurisdiction
required_information.question: Which estate court has jurisdiction based on last habitual residence or other route?

required_information.label: Applicant identities and application authority
required_information.question: Who applies and in which legal position?

required_information.label: Heirship basis
required_information.question: Is heirship based on statutory succession, will, inheritance contract or European certificate context?

required_information.label: Family and civil-status evidence
required_information.question: Which birth, marriage, divorce, adoption or death evidence is required?

required_information.label: Wills, inheritance contracts and opening records
required_information.question: Which dispositions and opening records exist and where are they referenced?

required_information.label: Renunciations, disclaimers and contests
required_information.question: Are there renunciations, disclaimers, contests, disinheritance or mandatory-share issues?

required_information.label: Eidesstattliche Versicherung statement scope
required_information.question: Which facts must be declared under oath and by whom?

documents.label: Death certificate or official death evidence reference

decisions.label: National certificate, European certificate or other declaration
Oath declaration route

gates.label: Heirship and evidence reviewed by notary
Oath statement and appointment readiness checked

cases.title: Vorsorgevollmacht und Patientenverfuegung
cases.summary: Precautionary power of attorney, health-care directives and patient directives with scope, agents, effectiveness, register and copy management.

required_information.label: Principal identity and capacity
required_information.question: Who grants the power and how is capacity reviewed?

required_information.label: Agents and substitutes
required_information.question: Who should act as agent, substitute or joint agent?

required_information.label: Financial and asset authority scope
required_information.question: Which financial, banking, property and business powers are intended?

required_information.label: Health, residence and care authority scope
required_information.question: Which health, residence, care, communication and authority powers are intended?

required_information.label: Patient directive decisions
required_information.question: Which treatment situations and medical wishes should be documented?

required_information.label: Effectiveness, revocation and copies
required_information.question: When should the power be usable, how is revocation handled and who receives copies?

required_information.label: Self-dealing and sub-delegation rules
required_information.question: Should self-dealing, sub-delegation or substitute powers be permitted?

required_information.label: Central register registration
required_information.question: Should a registration instruction be prepared for the central precautionary register?

decisions.label: Power of attorney only or combined patient directive
Central register registration

cases.title: Schenkungsvertrag / Uebertragungsvertrag
cases.summary: Gift or transfer agreement, often real estate within the family, with reserved rights, reversion, care obligations, tax and land register execution.

required_information.label: Transferor identity and capacity
required_information.question: Who transfers and are identity, capacity and ownership verified?

required_information.label: Transferee identity and family relation
required_information.question: Who receives and what family or tax relationship is relevant?

required_information.label: Transferred asset or property
required_information.question: Which property, share, business interest or other asset is transferred?

required_information.label: Reserved rights
required_information.question: Are usufruct, residential rights, maintenance, care obligations or usage rights reserved?

required_information.label: Reversion, revocation and securing rights
required_information.question: Which retransfer events, revocation grounds or notices should be secured?

required_information.label: Consideration and obligations
required_information.question: Is the transfer gratuitous, mixed, subject to debts, care or equalization payments?

required_information.label: Consents and approvals
required_information.question: Are spouse, court, guardian, administrator, bank, co-owner or public approvals required?

required_information.label: Tax, succession and mandatory-share flags
required_information.question: Which gift tax, succession, care, equalization or mandatory-share clarification flags apply?

documents.label: Land register excerpt if real estate is involved

decisions.label: Gift, mixed gift or transfer with obligations
Reserved rights to include and secure

gates.label: Family, tax and succession flags reviewed

evidence.label: Legal review and draft release evidence
Filing, tax notification and closing trace

cases.title: Ehevertrag / Scheidungsfolgenvereinbarung
cases.summary: Marriage contract or divorce consequences agreement covering property regime, equalization, pension rights, maintenance, asset division and fairness review.

required_information.label: Spouse identities and personal status
required_information.question: Who are the spouses or intended spouses and what status applies?

required_information.label: Marriage, separation or divorce context
required_information.question: Is this pre-marriage, during marriage, separation, divorce pending or post-divorce?

required_information.label: Property regime and equalization target
required_information.question: Should statutory property regime be modified, excluded or replaced?

required_information.label: Asset and debt disclosure categories
required_information.question: Which asset categories, business interests, debts or pensions are relevant without committing real values?

required_information.label: Maintenance provisions
required_information.question: Which spousal maintenance rules or waivers are intended and are fairness limits triggered?

required_information.label: Pension equalization provisions
required_information.question: Should pension equalization be modified and is court review expected?

required_information.label: Child and family dependency flags
required_information.question: Are child-care, dependency, pregnancy or imbalance flags relevant to fairness review?

required_information.label: Asset transfers and register consequences
required_information.question: Are real estate, company share, account or debt transfers part of the agreement?

documents.label: Marriage contract or divorce consequences agreement draft

decisions.label: Pre-marriage, marriage or divorce consequence agreement
Fairness and imbalance risk level

gates.label: Fairness and imbalance review completed by notary
